events.notes: I2 fresh-authored as a synthesis-driven new composition from Lean-module substrate (no per-paper-draft sources to lift; sourceless per PAPER_DRAFT_MAPPING.md). 28 referenced Lean modules. 820 lines / 9 sections. Mathlib upstream coordination plan §7 is conditional on R1/R2/R3 gate. AI-tool-assistance disclosure protocol documented. Software-only fallback path documented for Mathlib-acceptance delay scenario. Ready for reviewer triple (Stage 9/10/13).

Round 1 claims-reviewer remediation (5 BLOCKERs + 5 advisories addressed). BLOCKER fixes: (1) softened 4 not-shipped declaration claims to 'planned' / 'project-internal supporting lemmas' framing — VerifiedJackknife.Helpers (§2.1), QuasitriangularBialgebra/RibbonHopfAlgebra typeclasses (§4.4), ComputableAdjoinRoot bridge (§5.1, abstract); (2) test filename corrected from tests/test_jackknife.py → tests/test_verified_statistics.py with 4 test names cited; (3) per-module count drifts reconciled (§3 RibbonCategory 12→14; §4 QuantumGroupHopf 18→16 thm; §6 SU2kMTC 16→17, SU2kSMatrix 18→20, SU3kFusion 27→29, FibonacciMTC 16→18); aggregate counts reconciled (§4 86→101, §5 162→161, §6 11 files→10 files / 265→295 declarations; abstract 192-declaration → ~640 declarations); (4) bibliography reconciled — paper15methodology + paper44riemannian self-cites removed; 7 textbook/software bibitems (efron1982, wolff2004, bakalov2001, egno2015, turaev2010, kassel1995, mathlib4) added to src/core/citations.py CITATION_REGISTRY (Wave 6 textbook exemption applied; paper entries got DOI + arxiv where known). Advisory fixes: Lüscher chroma misattribution corrected (now 'SciDAC/USQCD Chroma codebase' descriptor); Microsoft Majorana attribution softened to 'broader research community'; Kaul-Majumdar emergent-MTC dependency now discloses IsolatedHorizonHypotheses tracked-Prop bundle (Phase 6j W1) per advisory #5. All 7 bibitems now have at least one \cite{} invocation in body. Ready for round-2 claims-reviewer + round-2 figure-reviewer (after figure-author subagent's PNGs verified).
